scripts.schema:generate: opam exec -- dune build packages/realtime-schema/src/realtime_schema_codegen_main.exe && opam exec -- ./_build/default/packages/realtime-schema/src/realtime_schema_codegen_main.exe --sql-dir ./demos/ecommerce/server/sql --out-triggers ./demos/ecommerce/server/sql/generated/realtime.sql --out-snapshot ./demos/ecommerce/server/sql/generated/schema_snapshot.json --migrations-dir ./demos/ecommerce/server/sql/generated/migrations
scripts.todo-mp:schema:generate: opam exec -- dune build packages/realtime-schema/src/realtime_schema_codegen_main.exe && opam exec -- ./_build/default/packages/realtime-schema/src/realtime_schema_codegen_main.exe --sql-dir ./demos/todo-multiplayer/server/sql --out-triggers ./demos/todo-multiplayer/server/sql/generated/realtime.sql --out-snapshot ./demos/todo-multiplayer/server/sql/generated/schema_snapshot.json --migrations-dir ./demos/todo-multiplayer/server/sql/generated/migrations
